postToolUse.bash: command -v markdown-link-check >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; files=$( { git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- '*.md' 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- '*.md' 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- '*.md' 2>/dev/null; } | awk 'NF' | sort -u ); if [ -z "$files" ]; then exit 0; fi; fails=0; echo "$files" | while IFS= read -r file; do markdown-link-check "$file" || fails=$((fails + 1)); done; if [ "$fails" -gt 0 ]; then exit 2; fi
